name: Earth-616 (Sacred Timeline)
description: The primary MCU timeline, protected by He Who Remains until the multiverse was unleashed. Home to the Avengers, Guardians, and all mainline MCU events.

name: Earth-838 (Illuminati Universe)
description: A parallel universe where the Illuminati—including Captain Carter, Professor X, Black Bolt, and others—maintained order. Their universe's Strange was executed for causing an incursion.

name: Earth-199999 (MCU Numeric)
description: The numeric Marvel Comics designation for the MCU timeline. Debated whether distinct from Earth-616 per Mysterio's claims.

name: Sony's Spider-Man Universe
description: Sony's connected universe featuring Venom, Morbius, and Kraven. Briefly intersected with MCU-616 through multiverse breaches.

name: Fox X-Men Universe
description: The original X-Men film universe featuring Wolverine, Professor X, and Magneto. Connected to the MCU through Deadpool & Wolverine.

name: What If...? Multiverse
description: Collection of alternate universes explored by The Watcher, each diverging from a single pivotal moment in the Sacred Timeline.

name: Loki's Branch Timeline
description: The timeline branch created when 2012 Loki escaped with the Tesseract during the Endgame time heist, leading to the TVA and the revelation of He Who Remains.

name: Netflix/Defenders Universe
description: Originally a separate continuity featuring the street-level heroes of Hell's Kitchen. Retroactively canonized into Earth-616 through Daredevil: Born Again.
